title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander demonstrates five planning tactics for using Antigravity 2.0 on complex enterprise codebases: linking multiple repositories, organizing coding standards hierarchically, sandboxing agent execution, using voice input for requirements, and leveraging agent interrogation via the /grill-me command to establish guardrails before code generation begins.
